description: Sixth-slice fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The sixth-slice Shadow Paladin recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is main-deck-only; G Zone and Stride runtime remain disabled.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Sixth Fixture Consumption and Six-Fixture Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the Shadow Paladin fixture can be consumed safely, export reviewable deck text, run a headless load smoke, then decide whether the fixture set is ready for another scale step.

tasks.title: Sixth fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate the Shadow Paladin runtime fixture independently from the M57 generator.

tasks.title: Sixth fixture deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the Shadow Paladin fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Sixth fixture headless load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the Shadow Paladin fixture through offline/headless paths without UI, bot, G Zone, or Stride mutation.

tasks.title: Six-fixture scale decision
tasks.goal: Review all six fixture evidence before selecting any further slice.
